betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Shredder§f

§aCrush ores into powder — 9 items at once. Needs 2 blades and 300 HE per cycle.§f

The §bShredder§f is an essential utility machine. Equip two §bShredder Blades§f and supply power. Spread input across all 9 slots to reduce blade/power cost per item.

§6Crafting§f:
Assembly machine: steel plates ×8, copper plates ×4, motors ×2.

§6Blades§f:
§b• Steel§f: 200 durability
§b• Titanium§f: 350
§b• Advanced Alloy§f: 700
§b• Desh§f: Unbreakable

§6Outputs§f:
§b• Ore → 2 powder§f (smelt for 2 ingots). Good early-game.
§b• Non-metals → powder§f (re-solidify with press)
§b• No powder form → §bscrap§f (4 furnace ops)

§eTip§f: Spread input across all 9 slots. Never re-shred scrap — dust is inferior.
